title: iberis pruitii subsp. granatensis
intro: Iberis pruitii subsp. granatensis, also known as the Granatensis Candytuft, is a perennial herb plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Iberis pruitii subsp. granatensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support skin health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including sore throats and coughs.
